zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Dacre於1264年9月3日出生在英國波藍德時，他的父親Ranulph Dacre19歲，母親Joan de Lucy29歲。他去世於1318年9月1日之前在英國藍卡爾普雷斯可特，埋葬在英國藍卡爾普雷斯可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Dacre于1264年9月3日出生在英国波藍德时，他的父亲Ranulph Dacre19岁，母亲Joan de Lucy29岁。他去世于1318年9月1日之前在英国藍卡爾普雷斯可特，埋葬在英国藍卡爾普雷斯可特。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Dacre was born on 3 September 1264, in Cumberland, England, his father, Ranulph Dacre, was 19 and his mother, Joan de Lucy, was 29. He died before 1 September 1318, in Prescot, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Prescot, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Dacre est né le 3 septembre 1264, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph Dacre, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan de Lucy, avait 29 ans. Il est décédé avant 1 septembre 1318, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Dacre am 3. September 1264 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph Dacre 19 und seine Mutter Joan de Lucy 29. Er starb vor 1. September 1318 in Prescot, Lancashire, England und wurde in Prescot, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Dacre è nato il il 3 settembre 1264 nel Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Ranulph Dacre, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Lucy, aveva 29 anni. Morì prima del 1 settembre 1318, nel Prescot, Lancashire, England, e fu sepolto a Prescot, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Dacreが1264年9月3日にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Ranulph Dacreは19歳，母Joan de Lucyは29歳であった。彼は1318年9月1日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Dacre(이)가 1264년 9월 3일 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph Dacre(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Lucy(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1318년 9월 1일 이전 영국 랭카실르 플레스컷에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 플레스컷에 묻혔다.

mn.3 September 1264–before 24 August 1318: 1264 оны Есдүгээр сарын 3–1318 оны Есдүгээр сарын 1–наас өмнө

pt.3 September 1264–before 24 August 1318: 3 de setembro de 1264–antes 1 de setembro de 1318
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Dacre nasceu em 3 de setembro de 1264, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph Dacre, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Lucy, tinha 29 anos. Ele faleceu antes 1 de setembro de 1318, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Dacre родился 3 сентября 1264 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Ranulph Dacre было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Lucy, 29. Он умер перед 1 сентябрь 1318 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия и был похоронен в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия.

es.3 September 1264–before 24 August 1318: 3 de septiembre de 1264–antes de 1 de septiembre de 1318
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Dacre nació el 3 de septiembre de 1264, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph Dacre, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan de Lucy, tenía 29 años. Murió antes de 1 de septiembre de 1318, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
